## Summary

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Public docs updated if behavior, tools, setup, or source policy changed
- [ ] New or changed parser covered by tests

## Source Scope

- [ ] Any new source is specifically about EverQuest Legends.
- [ ] No generic EQ1/EQ2, P99, EQEmu, Project Quarm, or emulator/background database source was added unless the specific page is EQL-specific.
- [ ] Unofficial/community sources are labeled clearly.
